overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban street. The player moves from a covered market area through open commercial streets lined with neon signs, food vendors, and pedestrians, approaching a large downtown intersection with towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with vending machines and food stalls

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open sunlit street

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market area past vending machines and food stalls, heading toward the street exit

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking past camera on the left
woman with red cap walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: concrete overhang covering the market walkway with industrial lighting fixtures
futuristic vending machine emitting bright green light
food vendor stall with red umbrella and white plastic chairs
storefront with red and white striped awning and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered market walkway with green floor tiles and vending machines. The player walks forward past food stalls and pedestrians, transitioning around the 12-second mark from the shaded covered area into the bright sunlight of an open commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial sidewalk with shops and outdoor seating

events.description: turning slightly right to follow the curve of the sidewalk
black sedan driving past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk passing various pedestrians and storefronts, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: woman in business suit standing with hands on hips near the railing
black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective teal glass facade dominating the skyline
large vertical digital advertisement screen on building facade
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street
white and red plastic chairs and tables outside the EROGI shop

segments.scene_description: Moving along an open sunlit sidewalk, the player passes the EROGI shop with its outdoor seating and continues past pedestrians. A woman in business attire stands near the green railing as a black car drives by. The massive teal glass skyscraper looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with newspaper stands and food vendors

events.description: entering shaded area under building awnings with red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking past newspaper racks and a food cart, continuing along the commercial street

notable_agents.action: man in tank top with tattoos standing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wall covered with vibrant yellow and purple anime-style posters and advertisements
metal racks filled with magazines and newspapers outside a shop
blue food vendor cart with umbrella on the sidewalk
large brown umbrella shading the food cart vendor

segments.scene_description: The player walks past colorful poster walls and newspaper stands lining the left side of the street. A food cart with a brown umbrella appears on the right. Around 35 seconds, the environment transitions into a darker, shaded area under building awnings as the teal skyscraper grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded walkway under deep awnings with red lanterns

events.description: exiting deep shade into area with mixed sunlight and shadow

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded corridor under building overhangs, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing under umbrella tending to cart

entered.detail: deep overhanging awning casting heavy shadow on the walkway
traditional red paper lanterns hanging outside storefronts
massive industrial ventilation fans mounted on building exterior
tall palm tree growing from street planter

segments.scene_description: Walking through a deeply shaded corridor under building awnings, the player passes red paper lanterns and large industrial ventilation fans on the right. The lighting shifts around 50 seconds as the path opens slightly, revealing the massive teal skyscraper growing closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large intersection with towering glass buildings

events.description: slowing slightly while approaching the crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: approaching the open plaza area with large digital billboards and the teal skyscraper ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive horizontal digital billboard displaying advertisements above the street
zebra crossing lines painted on the street surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player emerging from the shaded walkway into a brighter area approaching a large urban intersection. The teal glass skyscraper now dominates the center view, with massive digital billboards overhead. The ventilation fans recede into the distance on the right as the player approaches the crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a shaded market walkway into a bright commercial district that eventually leads back into the shadows of towering skyscrapers. It begins within a covered market area characterized by green floor tiles and vending machines, moving past food stalls and pedestrians before emerging into the brilliant sunlight of an open street. As the camera advances along the sunlit sidewalk, it passes the outdoor seating of an EROGI shop and a woman in business attire while a black car drives by, all under the gaze of a massive teal glass skyscraper looming in the distance. The scene then shifts past colorful poster walls and newspaper stands on the left and a brown-umbrellaed food cart on the right, before finally transitioning into a darker, shaded area under building awnings as the teal skyscraper grows to dominate the view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, sheltered corridor into the bright, expansive scale of a futuristic urban intersection. It begins by navigating a deeply shaded walkway under building awnings, passing red paper lanterns and large industrial ventilation fans. As the path opens, the lighting shifts and a massive teal skyscraper gradually emerges and grows larger in the distance. The scene then expands as the player emerges from the shade into a brighter environment, where the teal glass tower dominates the view beneath towering digital billboards. Finally, the ventilation fans recede into the background as the camera approaches the wide crosswalk of the bustling downtown center.
